name: Orange Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine the orange juice, sections, rind, sugar, and cornstarch in a medium saucepan. Cook on low heat, stirring occasionally, until clear. Beat the egg yolks in a small bowl and add a small amount of the hot mixture, stirring quickly to prevent the eggs from cooking. Whisk the warm egg yolk mixture into the hot mixture and cook, stirring continuously, for about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the lemon juice and butter. Set aside.
In a medium bowl, beat the egg whites on high speed until stiff peaks form; gradually add 2 tbsp sugar and mix until blended in. Pour the warm orange filling into the prebaked pie shell. Spoon the sweetened egg whites over the filling and bake at 350°F until the meringue is lightly browned.
